suggestions: I'm grateful for the quiet moments of peace before Fajr to center myself before the busy day starts.
I'm thankful for a smooth production deployment today with absolutely zero hotfixes needed.
I'm grateful for the simple joy of a hot, frothy cup of teh tarik during my afternoon coding break.
I'm thankful for the rezeki of a stable job in tech that challenges me and helps me grow every day.
I'm grateful for the patient senior developer who took the time to explain the system architecture to me.
I'm thankful for the cool morning rain that made the start of my day feel so fresh and calm.
I'm grateful for the feeling of finally solving a complex bug that had been bothering me all week.
I'm thankful for the physical energy to play a high-spirited game of futsal with my friends after work.
I'm grateful for my noise-canceling headphones, which help me find my flow state in a busy environment.
I'm thankful for the opportunity to step away from my screens and find peace in my daily prayers.
I'm grateful for a warm plate of nasi lemak and good laughs with my colleagues during our lunch break.
I'm thankful for the weekend trips back to my hometown to recharge and spend quality time with my parents.
I'm grateful for the flexibility of being able to work from a cozy local cafe when I need a change of scenery.
I'm thankful for the lifesaver that is clear API documentation when integrating a difficult new service.
I'm grateful for the peace of mind that comes with being able to save a portion of my income for the future.
